name_en: Dynamic Chip M45256 Black M45306 Blue M46526 Milky White Top-tier Original M45307 Milky White with Brown Top-tier Original NéoNoé Medium Tote Bag Crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, it exudes elegance with leather drawstrings and delicate eyelets. The lightweight structure fits the body's rhythm, cleverly using a removable top handle or detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for a comfortable experience whether carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
name_cn:
Dynamic Chip M45256 Black M45306 Blue M46526 Milky White Top-tier Original M45307 Milky White with Brown Top-tier Original NéoNoé Medium Tote Bag Crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, it exudes elegance with leather drawstrings and delicate eyelets. The lightweight structure fits the body's rhythm, cleverly using a removable top handle or detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for a comfortable experience whether carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
	•	Monogram Empreinte embossed grained calfskin
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Pocket
	•	Central zip pocket
	•	Metal eyelets
	•	Strap: Removable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 31.0 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 54.0 cm
	•	Handle: Single handle, removable
